rows.label: qev040103_MSG0003
rows.name:
I was forcefully dragged here by Lana, but...
Walolo... wants to go back to NLA already-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040103_MSG0004
rows.name:
Things have turned into a terrible mess-mo...
But Walolo... will take responsibility-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040103_MSG0005
rows.name:
Girls are scary-mo... Scarier than the Growth-mo...
Walolo is going to live alone forever now-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040103_MSG0006
rows.name:
Walolo will protect Lana and the child-mo.
I feel bad for her husband Bubu, but...
I'd like you to give him my regards-mo.[ST:wait ]
